summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: No test file provided despite explicit TDD requirement ('write a failing test FIRST'). No act-result.txt demonstrating tests running through act—required artifact missing. Workflow action refs not pinned to full commit SHAs (lines 25-26: `@v4`, `@v2` are branches, not 40-char SHAs)—violates stated best practice. Bash run step missing `set -euo pipefail` (line 42). CLI arg parsing manual/verbose (cleanup.ts lines 172-184). Code structure is sound but unverified by tests; changes are fragile without test coverage. Incomplete delivery.
